title: Dtail Spaces
description: A UE5 app where fashion brands build virtual showrooms with fixtures and products.
longdescription: Dtail Spaces is an interactive 3D app where fashion brands can put together hyperrealistic virtual showrooms by dragging and dropping fixtures and products into customizable retail spaces.

work.description: Cleaning up and reworking big chunks of the codebase to keep things maintainable.
work.title: Refactoring

work.description: Building new features for the app (NDA, so can't say much).
work.title: Feature Development

screenshots.alt: Virtual showroom with fixtures and product displays
Environment overview
DIsplays and Products
Connect to the Platform

title: Ember Sword
description: A browser-based MMORPG with open world exploration, crafting, and PvP combat.
longdescription: Ember Sword is a browser-based MMORPG. Players explore big open environments, fight creatures and bosses with VRising-inspired combat, craft gear, run trade packs across the world, and occasionally stab each other for loot.

work.title: Exploration
work.description: Built the open world with PvP zones, player-owned plots, questing, creature spawners, and patrolling mobs. Also worked on the instanced Ultra Deep dungeon.

work.title: Trade Packs
work.description: Built the Trade Pack system: gather resources, craft packs, deliver them for profit. Other players can steal your packs, so there's real risk vs reward.
Helped set up and iterate on the ability system. We use a custom timeline system where triggers fire at specific times, keeping client and server in sync.
work.title: Combat

work.description: Created the ValueBag, a flexible data container used for abilities, behaviors, instanced tracking, and more.
work.title: Gameplay Data

work.description: Built a custom Behavior Tree system with a live visualizer for debugging creature decision-making. Boars encircle you, javelin throwers keep their distance, and the Ultra Deep boss has phases and unique attacks.
work.title: Creature Behaviors

work.description: Made the first version of gathering. It got reworked by someone else later, but the original design came back and got built on top of.
work.title: Gathering

work.description: Built server-side crafting: players collect resources, find crafting stations in the world, and use them to make items.
work.title: Crafting

work.description: Designed and built a quest system with my gameplay lead (ex-WoW dev). It's fast, flexible, and easy to extend with new objective types.
work.title: Quests
Player Interaction
work.description: Built PvP mechanics, worked on chat, supported parties, and made the emote system.
Each boss has unique mechanics. Canavar charges and does close-range attacks based on player positions. Shauk returns to center for special attacks and has two phases with enhanced abilities.
work.title: Boss Battles

work.description: Tons of other systems and features over 4+ years.
work.title: And more...

screenshots.alt: Ember Sword open world with player characters in a fantasy landscape
Ember Sword combat encounter with creatures in a forest biome
Ember Sword player-owned land plots and town building
Ember Sword Ultra Deep dungeon boss encounter

title: Motherlode Tycoon
description: A tycoon game in Fortnite Creative that's actually fun, not just designed to farm engagement.
longdescription: A tycoon game built in Fortnite Creative (UEFN) with my friend. We wanted to make something genuinely fun instead of the usual engagement-farming stuff.

work.title: Core Design
work.description: Designed the core loop together: owning plots, building and upgrading structures, resource display, 3D world UI, and more.

work.title: Gathering
work.description: Built snappy gathering feedback with clear visuals. Players collect resources from the world to build and upgrade.

work.title: Cosmetics
work.description: Built a persistent cosmetics system. Players can buy and equip clothing, accessories, and other visual stuff.

work.title: Co-op Projects
work.description: Built a co-op system where players work together on shared goals like building or gathering.

work.title: Teleportation, Barriers and More
work.description: Built teleportation for fast travel, plus barriers that gate areas behind objectives or progression.

work.title: Gifts
work.description: Built a reward system for completing objectives, hitting milestones, or just waiting around.

work.title: Level Design
work.description: Designed the main level layout: resource spawners, player plots, and the overall vibe.

work.title: And more...
work.description: Various other systems and features.

videos.alt: Motherlode Tycoon gameplay trailer showing resource gathering and building

title: Void Resonance
description: A browser idle game set in space with deep prestige layers. Built entirely by AI as an experiment.
longdescription:
NOTE: This game was built from scratch by Claude & Copilot, including this portfolio entry.

Void Resonance is an incremental idle game where you harvest flux from a void reactor, build generators, research tech, and ascend through prestige layers like Echoes, Void Collapse, and Singularity.

work.title: Core Gameplay Loop
work.description: Built the clicking and idle mechanics: flux generation, generator chains, upgrades, and multi-tier buy modes.

work.title: Prestige Systems
work.description: Three prestige layers: Echoes (soft reset for permanent boosts), Void Collapse (second layer with Void Shards), and Singularity (third layer with Reality Fragments).

work.title: Research Tree
work.description: 18+ technologies that unlock new mechanics, boost production, and gate progression.

work.title: Void Expeditions
work.description: A side activity where players launch expeditions for artifacts, lore, and permanent bonuses.

work.title: Achievements & Events
work.description: Achievement system tracking milestones across all systems, plus random events like click frenzies and void rifts.

work.title: In-Game Wiki
work.description: Full wiki with LaTeX-rendered formulas explaining every mechanic and formula.

screenshots.alt: Void Resonance early game with reactor and first generators
Void Resonance mid-game with multiple generator types producing flux
Void Resonance late-game with all generators and billions of flux per second

title: ECS for Unreal
description: A prototype ECS framework for Unreal Engine using EnTT.
longdescription: After using EnTT on Ember Sword I got curious about building games with an ECS approach. So I made a framework on top of Unreal to create entities, attach data, and have systems process it all.

work.description: Set up the initial framework and API.
work.title: Core Framework

work.description: Built core systems: Transform, Rendering, Collision, and Cleanup.
work.title: Various Base Systems

work.description: Made an inspector that reads the entity registry and lists components. You can also edit data live, which is super useful for debugging.
work.title: Inspector Tools

title: Farmion
description: A wizard-themed farming sim with time management and co-op. Solo dev project!
longdescription: Solo dev project. Some art from the Unreal Marketplace, some made by me. Farmion is a wizard-themed farming sim where time management matters and you can play with friends!

work.description: Time management is key. Limited daylight, and every day is a 'Tick'. Forget to water crops? Dead. Left your cows outside? Gone. You'll die too if you're caught out during the Cycle transition.
work.title: A Cycle a Day

work.description: You can hold and throw anything. It's not real physics, just the illusion of it, which keeps things reliable in multiplayer while still feeling good.
work.title: Physics Fun

work.description: Plant crops that grow over X days and need Y water. Bees speed things up, hostile Bugs attack your plants.
work.title: Stage-Based Farming

work.description: Buy upgrades like a Pantry, Animal Barn, Greenhouse, and more.
work.title: Upgrades Everywhere

work.description: Games are better together. Farmion supports 1-6 players from the ground up.
work.title: Multiplayer

work.description: Redecorate your magical mansion while waiting for night to pass.
work.title: House & Character Customization

work.description: Make cheese from milk, curd it, age it in the right environment, sell it for profit. Or mess it up completely.
work.title: Cheese System

work.description: Throw any item into the Giant all-eating Statue for unique timed buffs. Recycling has never been this productive.
work.title: Buffs System

work.description: You can only carry one thing at a time, so use carts to haul stuff around.
work.title: Transportation and Carts

work.description: Various other systems and features.
work.title: And more...

title: Radiance Engine
description: A custom web-based MMORPG game engine built for Ember Sword.
longdescription: Radiance is a custom engine built by Bright Star Studios for Ember Sword. It's web-based, so the game runs in a browser on any platform.

work.description: Built a sync system between Unity and Radiance during the engine transition. Level and World Design could keep working in Unity until Radiance caught up.
work.title: Unity to Radiance Sync

work.description: Made a visual editor for animation state machines so designers could see states and transitions.
work.title: Animation State Machine Editor

work.description: Built a visual Behavior Tree editor for creating and tweaking AI behaviors.
work.title: Behavior Tree Editor

work.description: Made an item editor for designers to create and modify in-game items.
work.title: Item Editor

work.description: Made a recipe editor for managing crafting recipes. Both this and the Item Editor are built on a shared Base Editor Tool I made.
work.title: Crafting Recipe Editor

screenshots.alt: Radiance Engine behavior tree editor with real-time AI visualization
Radiance Engine animation state machine editor interface
Radiance Engine item editor tool for game designers
Radiance Engine crafting recipe editor with ingredient management
Radiance Engine Unity-to-Radiance level sync pipeline

title: BitFarers
description: A co-op FPS with theme-traversal dungeons and roguelike upgrades.
longdescription: A theme-traversal co-op FPS with roguelike elements. Players travel through differently themed dungeons, each with unique mechanics and enemies, and upgrade their characters along the way.

work.description: Built seamless multiplayer level transitions so all players move through dungeons together and regroup at the lobby.
work.title: Seamless Co-op

work.description: Worked on weapon mechanics: shooting, reloading, switching, ADS, and making sure everything replicates properly so other players see correct muzzle flashes and projectiles.
work.title: First Person Gunplay

work.description: Built a loot table system for breakables, enemies, and chests.
work.title: Loot, Loot, and Destructible Loot

work.description: Made the in-game HUD: buffs, debuffs, health, ammo, weapon display, and inventory.
work.title: User Interface

screenshots.alt: BitFarers first-person view inside a themed dungeon corridor
BitFarers co-op gameplay with HUD showing health and ammo

videos.alt: BitFarers dungeon exploration with weapon combat
BitFarers multiplayer level transition between themed zones
BitFarers loot and destructible objects gameplay
BitFarers lobby and character upgrade system

title: IdleCards
description: An idle game with card battling for phones.
longdescription: An idle game at its core with a card battling system on top. Collect cards, upgrade them, and use them in battles to progress.

work.description: Made a turn-based card battling system with AI opponents. The AI evaluates board state to pick its best move.
work.title: Card Battling vs AI

work.description: Built offline simulation so the game progresses while you're away. Come back to big numbers and that sweet dopamine hit.
work.title: Offline Idle Progression

work.description: Worked on 'fake 3D' card elements you can play on boards, plus 2D interfaces for buying and upgrading buildings.
work.title: Unity UI

screenshots.alt: IdleCards card battle screen with AI opponent and board state
IdleCards collection and upgrade interface with card stats
IdleCards idle progression buildings and resource generation

videos.alt: IdleCards turn-based card combat against AI
IdleCards idle progression and building management

title: Andromeda Resonance
description: 3D Wave Function Collapse in Unreal Engine, plus a mini-game to show it off.
longdescription: My graduation project at Utrecht University of the Arts for my BSc in Game Programming. A 3D Wave Function Collapse algorithm for Unreal Engine with a mini-game to demonstrate it.

work.description: Implemented the WFC algorithm in 3D space in Unreal Engine. It generates high-variety levels based on local similarity constraints.
work.title: Wave Function Collapse

work.description: Fly around the generated levels with a drone to check out the results.
work.title: Drone Flying

work.description: Wrote a paper on the algorithm and made a tool to generate 3D levels. Also recorded a YouTube tutorial on creating data assets for it.
work.title: Graduation Papers & Tools

videos.alt: Andromeda Resonance 3D Wave Function Collapse level generation demo
Andromeda Resonance WFC data asset creation tutorial

title: Cat Parent
description: Finn & Dusty need a lot of attention!
longdescription: Two Ragdoll cats: one white, one grey. Top-tier office staff.

title: Kio
description: A glassblowing puzzle game. Blow glass shapes that redirect light to solve puzzles.

title: StratEgel GameWork
description: A social gameplay framework by StratEgel B.V. Players build a world while balancing competing goals.

title: Hack Stevie
description: A cybersecurity awareness game for Dutch primary school kids, built during my internship at Flavour. Prequel to Hack Shield.

title: And more...
language: Mostly C# and some C++ during this period
description: Uni projects, hobby stuff, and other things I made over the years. Check the archived page for more.
